name: Cat Bird
author: Poki
description: Cat Bird is an adorable yet challenging 2D platformer where a cute flying cat embarks on a dangerous adventure full of tricky traps and tough obstacles. Move, jump, and flutter your wings to survive deadly hazards while testing your reflexes and quick decision-making at every turn. It may look cute, but this journey won’t be easy! Ready to guide Cat Bird safely through its perilous world? How to play Cat Bird? Move: A/D or the left and right arrow key Jump: Z or the space bar Fly: hold Z or the space bar Who created Cat Bird? Cat Bird is created by Raiyumi. Play their other games on Poki: Boost Buddies ! How can I play Cat Bird for free? You can play Cat Bird for free on Poki. Can I play Cat Bird on mobile devices and desktop? Cat Bird can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
